summary: Tested Admin Dashboard V2 features: Business Detail Dialog, Reviews Tab, Subscriptions Tab. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed all 6 tabs working (Resumen, Negocios, Usuarios, Reseñas, Suscripciones, Finanzas). Business Detail Dialog shows complete info including legal docs (RFC, CLABE, INE). Reviews tab has search, pagination, and delete functionality. Subscriptions tab shows summary cards and business list.

critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboardPage.jsx is well-structured with proper component separation (BusinessDetailDialog)
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
API integration in api.js correctly implements all new admin endpoints
Backend endpoints properly exclude _id from MongoDB responses
Business detail endpoint efficiently aggregates data from multiple collections

admin.note: Requires TOTP 2FA - use /app/scripts/get_admin_totp.py to generate code

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard V2 fully tested. Admin login requires TOTP 2FA - use the helper script at /app/scripts/get_admin_totp.py to generate codes. All 6 tabs working: Resumen (Overview), Negocios (Businesses), Usuarios (Users), Reseñas (Reviews), Suscripciones (Subscriptions), Finanzas (Finance). Business Detail Dialog accessible via Eye icon on any business row.

mocked_apis_list: Cloudinary image uploads use emergent object storage fallback
